title: Pathfinder
description: Share your Waypoint in real time with your friends, without any server support.
body:
![PathfinderLogo](https://i.imgur.com/Ts9lJh2.png)
## Share your Waypoint in real time with your friends, without any server support.

### ABOUT
Pathfinder makes it easier than ever to set waypoints in the world that your friends can see in real time.\
Thanks to a unique distribution system, it is not necessary for this mod to be installed on the server.

### FEATURES
- Create wayponts faster than ever. [SNEAK + Middle Mouse Button]
- Create your own gang. [P]
- Server support.

### REQUIREMENTS
Pathfinder is currently a [**Fabric**](https://fabricmc.net/ 'Fabric') only Mod so you have to install the [**Fabric API**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-api 'Fabric API') before adding Pathfinder to your game.\
This Mod is: **CLIENT SIDE**\
*You however can install Pathfinder on your Server to use the normal netwokring system.*


![PathfinderTemple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rop7iKZt/images/5b2674cd7774d4e7798ee0052ca425e90e1bc7d7.png)
![PathfinderCave](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rop7iKZt/images/7e007a8e1cf43c75f893b6536841c1d4f1716b2d.png)


### MISC
Feel free to include Pathfinder in your Modpack.

# [Find your Path now!](https://modrinth.com/mod/pathfinder/ 'Download')
